items.name: Government-Issued Uniforms
items.description: All uniforms, boots, and gear are issued at the depot
items.whyNeeded: The Marine Corps issues everything from MARPAT utilities to dress blues.
items.selectionTips: Do not purchase any uniforms or gear before arriving — wait to be issued.

items.name: Hygiene Supplies
items.whyNeeded: Hygiene is a constant focus from day one.
items.selectionTips: Unscented only. Travel-size. Keep it minimal.

recommendedProducts.name: Military Hygiene Starter Kit
recommendedProducts.reason: Packed to USMC depot standards so you clear hygiene inspections from day one without guessing what's authorized.

items.name: Athletic Socks
items.description: White crew or black socks depending on current reg
items.selectionTips: Check current USMC regs for authorized colors. Bring 10+ pairs.

recommendedProducts.name: Darn Tough Boot Cushion Socks
recommendedProducts.reason: Darn Tough socks outperform issued socks in Parris Island's brutal heat and humidity, reducing blister risk and lasting the full 13-week course.

items.name: Combination Lock
items.whyNeeded: Required to secure your rack and footlocker.
items.selectionTips: Memorize the combination. No key locks allowed.

items.name: Personal Identification Documents
items.description: Birth certificate, Social Security card, state ID
items.selectionTips: Original documents only. They will be collected and secured.

items.name: Foot Powder and Blister Kit
items.selectionTips: Parris Island terrain is brutal on feet. Apply powder daily.

items.name: Running Shoes (Pre-Ship)
items.description: Personal running shoes for pre-ship PT
items.selectionTips: You'll likely have a pair to wear en route. They may be used at the depot or stored.

recommendedProducts.name: Brooks Ghost 15 Running Shoe
recommendedProducts.reason: A top choice among USMC cadre for recruit PT. Neutral cushioning handles both the track and Parris Island's sandy terrain without breaking down.

items.name: Notebooks and Pens
items.selectionTips: Letters are your primary way to communicate. Stock up before departure.

items.name: Cell Phone
items.notes: Prohibited throughout training. Will be confiscated at reception.

items.name: Civilian Clothing
items.notes: All civilian clothing is secured or shipped home at reception.

items.name: Tobacco Products
items.notes: Tobacco is banned throughout recruit training at both depots.
